definition: code of the shape and size of the core or core halves of a soft magnetic part

definition_ml.en: code of the shape and size of the core or core halves of a soft magnetic part

remark: Code composition:| E-cores :   letter E followed by nominal length/width in mm.| EC-cores :   letters EC followed by nominal length in mm| ETD-cores :   letters ETD followed by nominal length in mm| P-cores :   letter P followed by nominal outer diameter/nominal length in mm| RM-cores :   letters RM followed by nominal sidelength of base square in mm| X-cores :   letter X followed by nominal sidelength of base square in mm| Code extension:| Codes may be extended by adding other nominal e.g. height and width.

remark_ml.en: Code composition:| E-cores :   letter E followed by nominal length/width in mm.| EC-cores :   letters EC followed by nominal length in mm| ETD-cores :   letters ETD followed by nominal length in mm| P-cores :   letter P followed by nominal outer diameter/nominal length in mm| RM-cores :   letters RM followed by nominal sidelength of base square in mm| X-cores :   letter X followed by nominal sidelength of base square in mm| Code extension:| Codes may be extended by adding other nominal e.g. height and width.
